title: 海立开源第三本Agent书籍《Deep Agents in Action》
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
向阳乔木
@vista8
海立老师写书速度真快，开源了第三本书《Deep Agents in Action》。
如果你对Agent开发感兴趣，可收藏学习，很好的资料。
Harry Zhang
@zhanghaili0610
Jun 18
A gift to the Chinese developer community for anyone building agents on @ LangChain :
After 2 books on the ecosystem, I open-sourced the third — Deep Agents in Action. 8 chapters live and counting, on the Agent Harness: planning, context engineering, sub-agents, Skills, memory.
5:55 AM · Jun 22, 2026 9.5K Views
